prompt_replacements.old: all_results keeps every result; take_one keeps exactly one result; take keeps the explicit number supplied by one result_limit input.
prompt_replacements.new: all_results keeps every result; take_one keeps every result tied for the first ordering value; take keeps the first explicit number of ordered results plus any later results tied with the last one kept.

prompt_replacements.old: Use take_one for a singular first, last, highest, or lowest result. Do not create a result_limit input for take_one.
prompt_replacements.new: Use take_one for a singular first, last, highest, or lowest request; tied results are co-results. Do not create a result_limit input for take_one.
